CustomField.description: Optional. The name of an Apex class that implements the framework's feature flag strategy interface. If provided, this class executes instead of the standard logic for the selected Type.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. To use your own custom Apex logic for this rule, enter the name of your Apex class here. This will override the standard 'Type' logic and ignore the 'Target' field (unless 'Type' is 'Custom Strategy' for backward compatibility).
CustomField.label: Custom Handler Class
